prompt: A bright, chaotic theatrical comedy movie poster in a polished Hollywood one-sheet style, vertical composition, with a retro yellow Mini Cooper speeding straight toward the viewer down a sunny palm-lined city street. The car is packed with exactly 5 vacationing friends: 2 visible in the front seats, 2 partially visible squeezed in the back, and 1 man sprawled on the roof luggage, pointing dramatically forward with a wild grin. Everyone wears colorful casual vacation clothes, including tropical prints, relaxed shirts, and sun hats. The scene feels loud, reckless, and fun. On the roof are stacked suitcases and travel bags. A police car with flashing lights chases from the rear right background. On the left side, a crooked wooden signpost has exactly 3 signs reading "BEACH", "MOUNTAINS", and "WHAT COULD GO WRONG?". A squawking seagull perches on top of the signpost. On the right side, a giant roadside donut shop sign reads "DONUT" and a folded paper map flies through the air. The street is full of motion blur, dust, debris, and tire energy, with a saturated blue sky and fluffy clouds above. At the very top, place exactly 4 actor names in black condensed caps: "DAVE JOHNSON", "LILY WANG", "KEVIN HARTLEY", and "AMY CHEN". Beneath that, add a stacked tagline in bold caps: "THEY CAME. THEY SAW." in dark navy, and "THEY MESSED EVERYTHING UP." in red. The main title dominates the upper middle in huge playful 3D typography: "{argument name="movie title" default="VACATION MODE"}", with "VACATION" in bright yellow and "MODE" in white, heavy blue shadowing, and the O replaced by a simple smiling face wearing sunglasses. Add small doodle-like yellow accent marks around the title. Across the lower right of the title, place a tilted hot-pink banner reading "A COMEDY ABOUT BAD IDEAS & GOOD TIMES" with a hand-drawn curved arrow pointing down. The car license plate reads "NO PLAN ALL FUN". Near the bottom, add a glowing pull-quote in yellow: "LAUGH-OUT-LOUD FUNNY!" and below it "- MOVIE BUZZ". At the bottom center, add the release line "ONLY IN THEATERS" and then "{argument name="release date" default="JUNE 20"}" in large bold yellow caps. Add tiny legal credits along the very bottom edge and small production logos in the corners, including "GOOD TIME FILMS" on the lower left and "NO PLAN ALL FUN" on the lower right. Use high-contrast lighting, exaggerated perspective, glossy commercial poster finish, vibrant summer colors, and a goofy road-trip comedy tone.
translatedPrompt: 一张明亮、混乱的院线喜剧电影海报，采用精致的好莱坞单张海报风格，垂直构图。一辆复古黄色 Mini Cooper 正沿着阳光明媚、棕榈树成荫的城市街道向观众疾驰而来。车内挤满了 5 位度假的朋友：前排可见 2 人，后排挤着 2 人，另有 1 名男子趴在车顶行李架上，咧着嘴大笑，戏剧性地指向前方。每个人都穿着色彩鲜艳的休闲度假服装，包括热带印花、宽松衬衫和遮阳帽。场景显得喧闹、鲁莽且充满乐趣。车顶堆放着行李箱和旅行包。右后方有一辆闪烁着警灯的警车正在追赶。左侧有一个歪斜的木制路标，上面有 3 个牌子，分别写着“BEACH”（海滩）、“MOUNTAINS”（山脉）和“WHAT COULD GO WRONG?”（还能出什么差错？）。一只尖叫的海鸥停在路标顶端。右侧有一个巨大的路边甜甜圈店招牌，上面写着“DONUT”，一张折叠的纸质地图在空中飞舞。街道上充满了动态模糊、灰尘、碎片和轮胎留下的能量感，上方是饱和的蓝天和蓬松的云朵。在最顶部，放置 4 位演员的姓名，使用黑色压缩大写字母：“DAVE JOHNSON”、“LILY WANG”、“KEVIN HARTLEY”和“AMY CHEN”。下方添加一行堆叠的标语，使用粗体大写字母：深海军蓝色的“THEY CAME. THEY SAW.”，以及红色的“THEY MESSED EVERYTHING UP.”。主标题以巨大的趣味 3D 字体占据中上方：“{argument name="movie title" default="VACATION MODE"}”，其中“VACATION”为亮黄色，“MODE”为白色，带有厚重的蓝色阴影，字母 O 被一个戴着太阳镜的简单笑脸取代。在标题周围添加黄色的小涂鸦式强调符号。在标题右下方，放置一个倾斜的亮粉色横幅，上面写着“A COMEDY ABOUT BAD IDEAS & GOOD TIMES”（一部关于坏主意与好时光的喜剧），并配有一个指向下方的手绘弯曲箭头。汽车牌照上写着“NO PLAN ALL FUN”。在底部附近，添加一句黄色的发光引语：“LAUGH-OUT-LOUD FUNNY!”，下方写着“- MOVIE BUZZ”。在底部中心，添加上映信息“ONLY IN THEATERS”，然后是“{argument name="release date" default="JUNE 20"}”，使用醒目的黄色粗体大写字母。在最底边缘添加微小的法律声明，并在角落添加小型制作公司 Logo，包括左下角的“GOOD TIME FILMS”和右下角的“NO PLAN ALL FUN”。采用高对比度照明、夸张的透视效果、光泽感的商业海报质感、鲜艳的夏季色彩以及搞怪的公路旅行喜剧基调。

breakdown.creativeCore: 混乱公路旅行喜剧海报：此提示词可生成一张精致的院线电影海报，适用于快节奏群像度假喜剧，是恶搞电影主视觉图或夏季电影海报概念的理想选择。
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: 3d, retro, hand-drawn]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
